title: athanasia sertulifera
intro: Athanasia sertulifera, also known as Cape marigold, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Athanasia sertulifera has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic benefits.
